---
title: Projects
description: A collection of research projects and software in climate science and R programming.
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
format:
  html:
    css: css/strapless.css
---

```{r projects}
source("_common.R")

readr::read_csv(here::here("content", "projects.csv")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-tags) %>%
  bs4cards::cards(
    title = title,
    text = description,
    link = url,
    image = src,
    label_colour = "#ffffff",
    border_radius = 5
  )
```
